name: Amp Limited
analysis: AMP has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 19% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$1.6000, stop A$1.4553, target A$1.8047 (1.41:1) — then trail it.
